label: Temporary rent and competitive erosion
description: Technology should raise margins temporarily, while high margins should mean-revert.

label: Rising organic composition of capital
description: Technology should raise the organic composition of capital.

label: Labour share decline via task-displacing capital
description: Technology should reduce the labour share more strongly in routine-intensive sectors.

label: Employment polarization and compression
description: Technology should reduce labour demand per unit of value added in routine-intensive sectors.
